name: opencode-multi-agent
description: Local multi-agent orchestration plugin for OpenCode

scripts.clean:dist: bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build:plugin: bun build src/index.ts src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external '@opencode-ai/plugin/*' --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external '@opencode-ai/sdk/*' --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external '@opencode-ai/plugin/*' --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external '@opencode-ai/sdk/*' --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build: bun run clean:dist && bun run build:plugin && bun run build:cli && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun run generate-schema
scripts.install:local: bun run build && bun dist/cli/index.js install
